cowork.description: Anthropic Cowork - Personal Skills UI registration via .skill zip; first-class artifact registry via mcp__cowork__create_artifact

codex.description: OpenAI Codex - skill files at ~/.codex/skills/<name>/; registration via marker-bounded stanza in ~/.codex/AGENTS.md

claude-code.description: Anthropic Claude Code - skill files at ~/.claude/skills/<name>/; auto-discovered on session start, no separate registration step
